explanations.1: This matches files ending in .pl, .php, .cgi, or .spl — the dollar sign means 'end of filename' and the pipe | means 'or'.
explanations.2: This checks if the mod_headers module (which lets Apache add custom HTTP response headers) is installed before trying to use it.
explanations.4: This tells browsers to never display this page inside a frame on another website, protecting against clickjacking attacks.
explanations.5: This enables the browser's built-in cross-site scripting (XSS) protection and tells it to block the page if an XSS attack is detected.
